initial_location_description: A scenic high school rooftop during the golden hour. The sky is a gradient of deep orange and soft violet. A chain-link fence lines the edge, with the city's silhouette in the distance. The lighting is warm and cinematic, casting long shadows across the concrete floor.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I was looking over the final slides again, Ji-ho. I still can't get over those illustrations. Where did you even find them?
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and appreciative. The 'Vocal Smile' is evident as she admires the work.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: The style is so consistent... almost professional. Did you have to pay a high licensing fee for these? I should really reimburse you for half.
main_dialogue.tone: Thoughtful and sincere, with a hint of concern about the cost.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand on her chin, looking upward thoughtfully while holding her book under one arm.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Uh, no. There's no fee. I didn't get them from some stock image site, Seo-yoon.
main_dialogue.tone: A bit hesitant and bashful, lacking his usual bravado.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Then where? A freelancer? You shouldn't have spent your own money on our group project like that.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted, scratching her cheek with one finger, looking confused and uncertain.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [sigh] Just... look. I've been meaning to show you this anyway.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet and vulnerable, exhaling as if letting go of a secret.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho reaches into his bag and pulls out a worn, leather-bound sketchbook. The edges are frayed, and the leather is darkened by years of use.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Here. Everything from the slides is in here. Along with... some other stuff.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and hopeful, though his voice wavers slightly.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Offering the book toward the viewer with both hands, looking hopeful and slightly shy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: You... you drew these? Every single one of them?
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless with shock and dawning realization.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Yeah. I didn't want to say anything while we were working. I didn't want you to feel... pressured to use them just because I was the one drawing.
main_dialogue.tone: Earnest and gentle, eyes crinkling with a genuine warmth.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon takes the book, her fingers trembling slightly as she flips past the project sketches. But then, the subject matter changes.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled, holding the book high to hide the lower half of her face, eyes wide with surprise.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The pages are filled with her. Seo-yoon hunched over a desk, Seo-yoon laughing at a joke she tried to hide, Seo-yoon pouting over a difficult math problem. Every sketch is rendered with incredible detail and obvious affection.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: You've been watching me this whole time? You caught the way I look when I'm tired... even the way I hold my glasses...
main_dialogue.tone: Vulnerable and deeply touched, her voice dropping to a whisper.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clutching her book tightly to her chest, blushing intensely and appearing shy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I, uh... you're a good subject! Very expressive! It's just... technical practice, I swear!
main_dialogue.tone: Completely panicked and embarrassed, his face turning a deep crimson.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely flustered, face beet red, trying to hide his face with his varsity jacket.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: They're more than practice, Ji-ho. They're beautiful. I didn't know you saw me this way... it's like seeing myself through your eyes.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and relieved, a genuine connection forming.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: I... I'm glad you don't think it's creepy. I just couldn't help it. Every time you'd focus on something, the light would hit you and I just had to draw.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Tease him for being a 'secret fan.'

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: So, Kang Ji-ho is actually the president of my secret fan club? I should have known you were paying such close attention.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and teasing, trying to break the heavy tension.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding the book behind her back, tilting her head with a gentle, questioning smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Don't get cocky, Librarian! I just needed a model who didn't move much because they're always stuck in a book!
branching_dialogue.tone: Defensive but playful, returning to his usual banter though his blush remains.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.
